self_study.description: A legendary flex-score booster, this item can only be applied to APs where all studying was done by a single individual without help.

out_of_school.description: Less prestigious than self studying, but still quite respected. This item is to be used on APs that were taken outside of your primary school.

perfect_score.description: The ultimate multiplier, reserved for those extremely rare perfect score letters.

sophomore.description: Respectable, trying to get ahead of the crowd. Just don't burn out
